name: Huntington Disease
summary: Huntington disease is caused by HTT CAG repeat expansions. GENARCH provides educational summaries only and does not provide individualized prediction.
adolescent_relevance: Typically manifests in adulthood; juvenile forms exist. Included for educational monogenic architecture context only.

genetic_architecture.prs_notes: PRS not applicable as primary model for monogenic HD.

exposure_modifiers.mechanism_hypothesis: General neurocognitive context; not treated as medical advice.
General neuroendocrine context; not treated as medical advice.
General health context; not treated as medical advice.

population_equity.gwas_ancestry_breakdown: HD research representation differs by geography; prevalence varies by population history.
population_equity.transferability_notes: Care access and measurement context differ across settings.

references.title: Huntington disease: genetics and molecular pathogenesis (review)
Sleep duration and health outcomes: overview of population evidence (review)
Psychosocial stress and health outcomes: mechanisms and evidence (review)
